_comment: Manual overrides for dataset metadata. Applied on top of catalog + preset data. Use for discontinued datasets, nicer labels, or corrected cat_no.

RT.name: Retail Trade (DISCONTINUED June 2025)
RT.discontinued_note: RT Retail Trade was discontinued after June 2025. Use HSI_M (Household Spending Indicator) or BUSINESS_TURNOVER instead.

RPPI.name: Residential Property Price Index
RPPI.note: Latest available data is from around 2021-Q4 in the API; more recent dwelling price data is available via RES_DWELL_ST.

LF_UNDER.name: Labour Force: Underemployment and Underutilisation
LF_UNDER.note: Also contains participation rate (M12), labour force size (M9), employment (M3), and unemployment rate (M13) for cross-validation.

HSI_M.name: Monthly Household Spending Indicator
HSI_M.note: Experimental indicator replacing Retail Trade (RT). Available from late 2022.
